atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right elbow pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports right elbow pain that began approximately four days ago.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain began following a period of intensive pottery making.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as aching.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as localized to the inside of his elbow.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as radiating down the forearm.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is exacerbated by activity.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports the pain is present at rest.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any recent trauma or injury to the elbow.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals tenderness to palpation over the medial epicondyle of the right elbow.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Range of motion is limited due to pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports pain with resisted wrist flexion and pronation.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The x-ray demonstrates no fracture or bony abnormality.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient is prescribed ibuprofen 600 mg every 6 hours with food for one week.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor instructs the patient to apply ice to the elbow three times daily for 20 minutes.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The doctor orders a sling to be worn during wakefulness.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: A follow-up appointment is scheduled in one week to assess progress.
